untranslatable_reason: Signal references specific performance metrics from Tables 22.1, 22.3, and 22.4 that are not provided in the excerpt. Specific thresholds for 'upward breakouts within a third of the yearly low', exact wick ratios, volume confirmation criteria, and price target calculation method (Table 22.3 measure rule) cannot be quantified without source data. Additionally, 'yearly low' calculation is not available in allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Translated available components: upward breakout as close > prev_close, tall wicks as upper_wick > body AND lower_wick > body, and volume confirmation as volume > vol_ratio_20. Exit condition uses reversal signal (close < prev_close). Stop loss set to conservative 2% pending author guidance. Target regime set to TRENDING_DOWN per stated use case (reversals in primary downtrend). Missing: precise breakout threshold, yearly low reference, specific volume metrics, and price target methodology.
